d: Lorsan channels his power to summon a storm centered on the [[frontmost]] enemy, lasting for [[5]]s. Enemies within [[2]] tiles of the target are affected by the storm, suffering a [[30]] Haste reduction and taking [[50%]]<ATK> damage from Lorsan every [[0.5]]s.
Increases the storm damage per hit to [[55%]]<ATK>.
Increases the storm damage per hit to [[60%]]<ATK>.
Increases the storm damage per hit to [[65%]]<ATK>.
Increases the storm damage per hit to [[70%]]<ATK>.

When a battle starts, Lorsan links the nearest and farthest enemy heroes to each other with Stormbound Chain. The chain transfers [[70%]] of the damage taken by one of the linked enemies to the other. Damage transferred by the chain cannot exceed [[500%]] of Lorsan's ATK and will not defeat the enemy. The chain breaks when its total damage dealt to both enemies reaches [[900%]] of Lorsan's initial ATK, or if one of the linked enemies is defeated.
Increases the damage transferred to the linked enemy to [[80%]] of the original damage.
Increases the damage transferred to the linked enemy to [[90%]] of the original damage.
Increases the damage transferred to the linked enemy to [[100%]] of the original damage.
Lorsan protects the [[weakest]] ally with Zephyr's Embrace for [[6]]s. While active, the protected ally gains [[50]] [[dodge chance]], [[30]] Haste, and recovers [[-90%]]<ATK> HP per second.
Increases HP recovered per second to [[-100%]]<ATK>.
Increases HP recovered per second to [[-110%]]<ATK>.
Increases HP recovered per second to [[-120%]]<ATK>.
Lorsan increases his ATK by [[9%]] during battle. When Stormbound Chain breaks for the first time, Lorsan's ATK is increased by an extra [[6%]].
Lorsan increases his ATK by [[12%]] during battle. When Stormbound Chain breaks for the first time, Lorsan's ATK is increased by an extra [[8%]].
Lorsan increases his ATK by [[15%]] during battle. When Stormbound Chain breaks for the first time, Lorsan's ATK is increased by an extra [[10%]].
Lorsan recovers [[200%]]<ATK> of HP for all allies when Stormbound Chain breaks. He will then cast Stormbound Chain again, with a maximum of [[3]] casts per battle.
Increases HP recovered to [[300%]]<ATK> when Stormbound Chain breaks.
Stuns the last linked [[2]] enemies for [[5]]s when Stormbound Chain breaks.
Increases HP recovered to [[400%]]<ATK> when Stormbound Chain breaks.
While Zephyr's Embrace is active, the protected target becomes [[unaffected]].

Lorsan can cast Stormbound Chain [[5]] times. Each time Stormbound Chain transfers damage, it also inflicts [[max HP reduction]] equal to [[20%]] of the transferred damage. Whenever Stormbound Chain breaks, the ally dealing the most damage gains Zephyr's Embrace for [[4.5]]s. If that ally already has this effect, its duration will be extended by [[4.5]]s.
